authenticatedUploadResultSummary: A synthetic authenticated staging smoke registered and logged in a consumer, uploaded a generated TransUnion PDF, invoked ingest processing, then retrieved upload-results. The retrieval returned 0 tradelines and the command failed.

commandsRun.summary: Build, golden path, unit suite, deterministic ingestion, parser regression, tradeline internal, and violation correction checks passed.

criticalFailures.title: Authenticated staging consumer upload did not produce usable results
criticalFailures.evidence: pnpm run smoke:auth-workflow failed with Expected at least 2 synthetic tradelines, found 0.

criticalFailures.title: Production-scale certification omits the authenticated upload-to-results smoke
criticalFailures.evidence: scripts/production-scale-certification.mjs gate list does not include pnpm run smoke:auth-workflow.

criticalFailures.title: Authenticated smoke does not poll worker-backed ingest status to terminal state
criticalFailures.evidence: Smoke calls process then immediately queries upload-results; staging/production process endpoint is queue-backed.

remediationTasks.prompt: Fix the staging authenticated consumer upload-to-results path without rewriting ingestion. Use a synthetic auth smoke that registers a user, uploads a generated PDF, enqueues processing, polls /_api/ingest/status until terminal state, verifies worker heartbeat/job state, verifies tradelines/canonical/finding/result rows for the same owner, verifies non-owner denial, and cleans up.

Update scripts/staging-auth-workflow-smoke.ts so it treats queued process output as non-terminal, polls /_api/ingest/status with a bounded timeout, fails on stalled/no-worker/manual-review unless explicitly expected, and verifies upload-results only after completed status. Add it as a required gate in production-scale certification or staging deploy evidence.
Extend authenticated workflow smoke with a second synthetic user to prove non-owner denial for upload-results, packet recommendation/build/create, and packet PDF.
Add an automated browser smoke for /upload and /upload-results using a synthetic authenticated user and no real PII.

unverifiedAreas.reason: No browser automation was run; API smoke failed first and proved the core result path blocked.
Inventoried and mapped to tests, but not staged with a synthetic admin in this run.
The staging smoke cleaned up the synthetic account by design and did not emit artifact/job diagnostics before failure.

unverifiedAreas.area: Live external providers and live deploy
unverifiedAreas.reason: Explicitly out of scope; no live external calls or deploys were run.
